Distinctive noble patent calf leather, exquisite and fashionable new lock closure. The large logo triangle emblem is perfectly integrated into the bag body. Comes with 2 detachable and adjustable shoulder straps, can be used as a shoulder bag or adjusted to a crossbody bag. Smooth and sharp lines, retro yet trendy! Perfect details comparable to the real thing👍🏻
Size: 24×11×4cm
Style No.: 1BD345

items.name_en: 🌟Hobo 3-in-1 (Full Leather)
items.name_cn:
🌟Hobo 3-in-1 (Full Leather)
Includes detachable P. Re-Edition 2005 Saffiano leather nameplate with keychain, detachable adjustable logo fabric shoulder strap, detachable zippered leather pouch, detachable metal chain shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Top zipper closure. Nylon lining. Enamel triangle metal logo!
Size: 22x18x6.5CM
Model: 1BH204
